user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived damaged. | Support: What part of the package was affected? | Customer: One corner was crushed in when I received it. | Support: Is the item inside part of this claim? | Customer: Not right now. I am reporting the package corner damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the claimed package corner with visible crushing damage, consistent with the user's description.
claim_status_justification: The image img_1 clearly shows the package corner with visible crushing damage, which directly aligns with the customer's description of the issue.
